mapper.sql: id, record_no, equipment_name, equipment_code, customer_name, inspector, inspection_date, inspection_type, result, defect_count, remark, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tbl_quality_record WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_quality_record ( record_no, equipment_name, equipment_code, customer_name, inspector, inspection_date, inspection_type, result, defect_count, remark, deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{recordNo}, #{equipmentName}, #{equipmentCode}, #{customerName}, #{inspector}, #{inspectionDate}, #{inspectionType}, #{result}, #{defectCount}, #{remark}, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tbl_quality_record
update_time = NOW(), record_no = #{recordNo}, equipment_name = #{equipmentName}, equipment_code = #{equipmentCode}, customer_name = #{customerName}, inspector = #{inspector}, inspection_date = #{inspectionDate}, inspection_type = #{inspectionType}, result = #{result}, defect_count = #{defectCount}, remark = #{remark},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tbl_quality_record SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT record_no FROM tbl_quality_record WHERE record_no LIKE CONCAT(#{datePrefix}, '%') ORDER BY record_no DESC LIMIT 1
